sentences.text: Thank you for calling Pacifica companies. If you know, your party's extension you may dial it at any time. Thank you. If you know your party's extension you may dial it now to dial by name press pound one for the directory using the telephone keypad. Please begin spelling. The first or last name of the person you wish to call to listen to these choices again press Star to return to the previous menu press pound. No names match the name you entered using the telephone no names match. The name you entered using the telephone keypad. Please begin spelling. If you know your party's extension you may dial it at any time. Thank you. If you know your party's extension you may dial it now to dial by name press pound one for the directory listing press pound to to listen to these choices again press Star. Dialing Pacifica companies receptionist. Thank you for calling Pacifica companies do to the current state of emergency in California Pacifica company's corporate office is currently closed until further notice or until the shelter in place. The order is lifted please be assured that many of our Associates are working remotely and will be checking their voicemails when they can most will also be accessible via email in the

event. You do not have the email address of the department or person you are trying to reach please leave your name number and email address and a brief message we will make every effort to forward to your information as soon as we can thank you for your cooperation and patience during these difficult times. We look forward to.

conversation.title: Call: Dan Cellon and Ashok Israni @ Pacifica SD Management
